title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Canopy Growth reported Q4 fiscal 2024 results with organic revenue growth of 16% year-over-year. Consolidated net revenue was $73 million CAD with consolidated gross margin improving to 21% from 11% in prior year. Management highlighted shift toward asset-light model, focusing on core strengths while leveraging third parties. Canada Cannabis revenue grew 4% to $37 million with medical sales increasing 16% year-over-year. Segment faced temporary headwinds including lower cultivation yields at Kincardine facility. International Markets sales climbed 32% year-over-year with Poland achieving triple-digit growth and Germany posting double-digit increases. Storz & Bickel vaporizer revenue surged 43% to $22 million driven by strong demand for new Venty portable device. Company reduced debt by over $700 million during fiscal 2024 with cash holdings exceeding $200 million and no material debt obligations until March 2026. Management expects fiscal 2025 to deliver healthy annual growth across Canadian and international operations with stronger performance anticipated in second half.
